page_content:
Prerequisite: MUSC450; or permission of ARHU-School of Music department.

MUSC653 Jazz Improvisation | (3 Credits)

Study of improvisational techniques and historical styles of jazz, including study of jazz "language" through transcription and analysis of recorded solos, and the exploration of creative processes and philosophical concepts.

Restriction: Permission of ARHU-School of Music department. Credit Only Granted for. MUSC653 or MUSC699Z.
